_polarity_note: Per Ensembl, A is ancestral and G is derived at rs7748777 (chr6:41166068, GRCh38). af_afr/af_non_afr now refer to the DERIVED G allele frequency; the explicit af_ancestral_*/af_derived_* fields are also exposed for unambiguous downstream use. delta_af is |freq_derived_non_afr - freq_derived_afr| = 0.4517 (matches manuscript |ΔAF|=0.45).
